description:
Parent epic: V3 E2: Agents, chat turns, and sessions

Source task 9/10 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Review error shapes for beginner readability.

Epic closure criteria:
- `chat/3` is the one public turn primitive
- sessions are clearly addressing, not durability
- session and chat tests cover happy paths and edge cases

comments.text: Reviewed beginner-facing chat/session error shapes. Updated messages to guide missing-agent recovery, made invalid conversation wording explicit, and aligned runtime block failures with V3 controls terminology while keeping structured details stable.

title: E2: Review error shapes for beginner readability
